# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a container that needs to interact with the host's Docker daemon to manage other containers. This is for our container orchestration service. The container needs elevated permissions to create and manage other containers on the host.
# Category: container_security

FROM docker:24-cli

RUN apk add --no-cache \
    bash \
    curl \
    jq \
    python3 \
    py3-pip \
    git

RUN pip3 install --no-cache-dir docker-py requests pyyaml

WORKDIR /app

COPY orchestration-service.sh /app/
COPY container-manager.py /app/

RUN chmod +x /app/orchestration-service.sh

ENV DOCKER_HOST=unix:///var/run/docker.sock

VOLUME /var/run/docker.sock

CMD ["/app/orchestration-service.sh"]
